Nicktoons.uk.title: Wylde Pak
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Chuck moves in after Lil & Jack accidentally destroy his house in 'Caught Rubber - Handed', then in 'And... Action!', Lily films her own K-Drama finale with her family as the cast & crew.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Wylde Pak
Nicktoons.uk.desc: The family scrambles to prep for inspection in 'Just a Little Pipe Problem', then in 'Camp Chuck', Chuck's theatre camp goes haywire.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Tales of the Ninja Turtles
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Scratch is a bigger threat than Leo thought...the Turtles have an arch-nemesis.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Sonic Prime
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Dr. Don't and Dr. Babbles - flanked by Eggforcers and captive tech guru, Nine - search the Boscage Maze for its prism shard. And Sonic has the same plan, too.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Sonic Prime
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Knuckles the Dread's pirate crew rages against Dr. Deep and Dr. Done It. The Eggforcers triumph and take Dredd's shard, abandoning the captive Rusty Rose behind.

Nicktoons.uk.title: ALVINNN!!! and The Chipmunks
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Theodore gives Dave an ugly handmade vest in 'The Gift', and then in 'Theo Knows Best', when Theodore finds a winning lottery ticket, everyone has ideas on how the money should be spent.

Nicktoons.uk.title: ALVINNN!!! and The Chipmunks
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Simon is alarmed to discover he's been tagging private property in his sleep in 'Simsky', then in 'Lucky Day', Alvin's luck goes from bad to worse after Theodore finds a four-leaf clover.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Open Season: Call of Nature
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Kiki goes AWOL in 'Clowning Around', then in 'The Deer and the Pussycat', Elliot and Cleo end up as unlikely partners on a dangerous boat journey.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Open Season: Call of Nature
Nicktoons.uk.desc: A visiting tortoise gets in an "accident" in 'Playing Dead', then in 'Beef in the Mess Hall', Elliot's big mouth gets him in trouble once again.
